TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Margrethe_II, title = Margrethe_II, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Margrethe_II} }

S.FORM: I 1940 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 16 a romi'ad a mahofoc ci Margrethe II, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Denmark anini i ci Margrethe II, patirengan i 1972 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 14 a romi'ad. Kahofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ nikalahongtian ÁĻľśČŅÁéčšĹć lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ a mańßo~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mar*r…ôtńß…ô ii, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …¨~…ģ…ônmark anini i ¶i mar*r…ôtńß…ô ii, patir…ôŇčan i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. kańßo~ufo~u ¶an a …ĺo~uma ° **** nika…ĺańßo~uŇčtian **** …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ **
S.FORM: I 1940 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 16 a romi'ad a mahofoc ci Margrethe II, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Denmark anini i ci Margrethe II, patirengan i 1972 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 14 a romi'ad. Kahofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ nikalahongtian ÁĻľśČŅÁéčšĹć lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂
